label: Transparent obsidian motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an obsidian shard motif with black glass body, smoke grey facets, edge blue glints, and volcanic mineral sharpness, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single fractured obsidian shard cluster with glossy black planes, razor edges, subtle smoke inclusions, blue edge highlights, and realistic volcanic glass texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop shard tips or reflective edges.
Lighting/mood: controlled studio light, sharp security-system mood, high-contrast black glass and cool edge detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry, no lava field background, no hands, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Obsidian" derived from the visible transparent obsidian shard motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from black glass, smoke grey, edge blue, ash surfaces, and fractured shard geometry. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Obsidian, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, security metric cards, audit charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, shard dividers, sharp security controls, glass-edge focus states.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Obsidian".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Obsidian design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent obsidian shard motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve black glass depth, smoke grey surfaces, edge blue focus, shard geometry, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Obsidian, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: volcanic core background, smoke-white text, edge blue primary accents, smoke grey cards, glass glint borders, strict security status states, crisp controls.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
